title: Rewind
story: No move is final. u rewinds your last change; Ctrl-r replays it. The fearless editor wields both — cut boldly, knowing you can always step back.

challenges.intro: Burn the false line. (If you ever strike the wrong one, u brings it back.)
challenges.hint: dd deletes the line. Press u to undo a mistake, Ctrl-r to redo it.

challenges.intro: Echo the word once more. Then try u and Ctrl-r to feel time bend.
challenges.hint: yy then p makes the copy. u removes it; Ctrl-r brings it back.
